ksa_text: Ability to design and implement post-market monitoring systems for AI applications, including performance data collection, analysis, and serious incident investigation and reporting.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — included on balance: ability carries governance/compliance signals ("post.market   :monitor|surveil", "serious incident") in Risk Management context (affinity 0.58). Composite minimal (0.0000). A AI Lifecycle Manager would encounter this competency in regulatory program work.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation strong: 3 job-posting-level and 2 framework/certification matches (EU AI Act, ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF, CIPP/E, CRISC). Competency appears regularly in AI compliance and regulatory affairs role descriptions.

decision_rationale: Edge case — included on balance: ability carries governance/compliance signals ("post.market   :monitor|surveil", "serious incident") in Risk Management context (affinity 0.58). Composite minimal (0.0000). A AI Lifecycle Manager would encounter this competency in regulatory program work.
